prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) paired with a **Ferrari F160BC (3.9L V8 twin-turbo) engine** to push boost from the stock 1.2 bar to 1.8 bar, requiring a **Motec M150 ECU** with custom fuel mapping for 98 RON + E85 flex-fuel capability, supporting 750+ HP at the crank while retaining the stock redline (8,000 RPM).

Install **Brembo GT 6-piston monobloc calipers** (front) with **390mm CCM-R discs** (upgraded from stock 380mm) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with **AP Racing CP8470-2 rear calipers** (4-piston) and **360mm discs** for balanced fade resistance under extreme track use.

Replace the stock **Ferrari-spec Bilstein adaptive dampers** with **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (custom valved for the Roma Spider’s 1,570kg weight), featuring **3-way adjustable compression/rebound** and **remote reservoirs**, paired with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs** (front) and **900N/mm springs** (rear) to eliminate body roll while maintaining compliance for street driving.
estetica: Fit a **Novitec N-Largo widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm wider front/60mm wider rear) with **custom 3D-printed air vents** (integrated with the stock cooling ducts) to accommodate **20x10.5 ET35 (front) and 21x12.5 ET45 (rear) Forgeline GA5R wheels** wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R 275/30R20 (front) and 315/30R21 (rear)** tires.

Replace the stock **Ferrari Roma Spider’s retractable hardtop** with a **Novitec N-Top carbon fiber fixed hardtop** (weight reduction of 22kg) featuring a **custom rear spoiler** (Gurney flap integrated) and **active aero side skirts** (adjustable via hydraulic actuators, synchronized with the Öhlins suspension for dynamic downforce tuning).

Install **Lumma Design CLR RS front bumper** (carbon fiber, with **integrated LED DRLs** and **custom titanium mesh grilles**) paired with a **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser** (carbon fiber, 3-stage design with **active air curtains** for drag reduction at high speeds), finished in **Ferrari Giallo Modena paint with matte black accents** and **custom gold-pinstripe detailing** (hand-painted by **Carrozzeria Zanasi**).
